evidence_refs.quote: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) models are sometimes initialized by "upcycling"—copying a single dense checkpoint into each expert slot. We investigate whether exact cloning of a dense distilled model into all MoE experts constitutes a collapse mode under pure knowledge distillation (KD).
